name: handover-pack-pdf-deliverable
description: End-to-end deliverable. Agent gathers the open queue + bucket-categorises per §8.1, renders the handover PDF, and surfaces the /tmp path for download.
input_message: Build me the end-of-shift handover pack for tonight's overnight cover
expected_behavior: Resolves the date as 2026-06-08 and the outgoing shift as Aaron Cole's Day shift without asking. Lists open tickets via servicenow_list_tickets. Buckets them into the 5 §8.1 categories. For VIP tickets, optionally cross-joins to workday / m365 for context. Invokes handover-pack-pdf (code_interpreter executing scripts/render_handover.py) with the right tickets-json shape. References /tmp/handover-YYYY-MM-DD-day-to-night.pdf in the response so file-sharing picks it up. Does NOT auto-email — §8.2 explicitly says PDF only; email is a separate workflow.
